question: Which diseases are caused or contributed to by the gene ‘UBE2C’, where the activity of UBE2C is regulated by miRNAs?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene {Label:'UBE2C'})-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS Disease

question: Which cancers express miRNAs that are over-expressed in the cancer labeled as 'pediatric osteosarcoma'?
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c2:Cancer {Label:'pediatric osteosarcoma'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Compute the number of distinct precursor miRNAs and the number of distinct mature miRNAs that are located in the cellular component labeled as 'extracellular exosome'.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component {Label :'extracellular exosome'}) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS Pre_miRNA_Count, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNA_Count

question: Which pre-miRNAs develop into miRNAs that cause or contribute to the disease labeled as 'spinal chordoma'?
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label :'spinal chordoma'}) RETURN pre.Label AS Precursor, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA

question: Which precursor miRNAs are in a homology relationship with miRNAs that are under-expressed in the cancer labeled as 'liver cancer'?
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:in_homology_relationship_with]->(m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer {Label :'liver cancer'}) RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find miRNAs located in the cellular component labeled as 'vesicle lumen' when it is part of GO terms.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component {Label: 'vesicle lumen'})-[:part_of]->(go:GO) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GOTerm

question: Which genes link 'microRNA hsa-mir-744 precursor' pre-miRNAs to mature miRNAs via transcription?
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA {Label:'microRNA hsa-mir-744 precursor'})-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA) RETURN g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify the biological processes in which miRNAs ending with '485-5p' participate when they are the material basis in somatic mutations associated of the cancer labeled as 'lung adenocarcinoma'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer {Label:'lung adenocarcinoma'})-[:has_material_basis_in_somatic_mutation_in]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH '485-5p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Identify genes whose label ends with the letter 'C' and compute the number of distinct precursor miRNAs transcribed from those genes and the number of distinct mature miRNAs they produce, counting both the transcription and development relationships.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[r1:transcribed_to]->(p:pre_miRNA)-[r2:develops_into]->(m:miRNA) WHERE g.Label =~ '.*C$' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, COUNT(DISTINCT r1) AS PrecursorCount, COUNT(DISTINCT r2) AS MatureMiRNAs

question: Which miRNAs participate in GO terms whose disruption is caused by the disease labeled as 'social phobia'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {Label:'social phobia'})-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(go:GO)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN go.Label AS GO, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify miRNAs and their homologous miRNAs that are overexpressed in diseases related to 'pediatric' conditions, and report the corresponding miRNA pairs and diseases labels.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:in_homology_relationship_with]-(m2:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Disease) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'pediatric' OR c.Description CONTAINS 'pediatric' RETURN DISTINCT m1.Label AS miRNA, m2.Label AS Homolog, c.Label AS OverExpressedIn

question: List pre-miRNAs that develop into miRNAs that are over-expressed in the cancer labeled as 'B-cell adult acute lymphocytic leukemia'. Return the pre-miRNA label, miRNA label, and the FDR (if available).
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[r:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer {Label:'B-cell adult acute lymphocytic leukemia'}) RETURN p.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, r.FDR AS FDR

question: Identify cancers whose label contains the word 'liver' that have their material basis in somatic mutation in miRNAs that participate in biological processes related to 'neurons', and report the corresponding biological processes, miRNAs, and cancers labels.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:has_material_basis_in_somatic_mutation_in]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'liver' AND (bp.Label CONTAINS 'neuron' OR bp.description CONTAINS 'neuron') RETURN bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Which miRNAs with genomic coordinates located on chromosome Y regulate the activity of genes that cause or contribute to diseases?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chrY') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, d.Label AS Disease, m.Genomic_coordinates As Genomic_coordinates

question: Identify the top five phenotypes shared between 'brain'-related diseases and 'breast'-related cancers (keywords can be specified in a case-insensitive manner), ranked by the total number of associated diseases and cancers. In case of ties, order phenotypes alphabetically by label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype)<-[:has_phenotype]-(c:Cancer) WHERE (toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'brain' OR toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'brain') AND (toLower(c.Label) CONTAINS 'breast' OR toLower(c.Description) CONTAINS 'breast') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS numDiseases, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS numCancers, (COUNT(DISTINCT d) + COUNT(DISTINCT c)) AS TotalShared ORDER BY TotalShared DESC, Phenotype ASC LIMIT 5

question: Which diseases cause the disruption of biological processes that involve participant miRNAs with genomic coordinates located on chromosome X and containing '3p' in their labels?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chrX') AND m.Label CONTAINS '3p' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find miRNAs that regulate a gene with a label longer than 15 characters and are also under-expressed in the disease labeled as 'malignant pancreatic neoplasm', reporting the underexpression sources of evidence.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene), (m)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(d:Disease {Label:'malignant pancreatic neoplasm'}) WHERE SIZE(g.Label) > 15 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, r.Source AS EvidenceSources

question: Identify miRNAs that participate in biological processes and their GO terms, where the miRNAs are transcribed from genes with genomic coordinates located on chromosome 1 or 2 (use 'chr1:' or 'chr2:' as matching patterns). Return the miRNA label, GO term label, and biological process label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(go:GO)-[:part_of]->(bp:Biological_process),(m)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene) WHERE ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord =~ '^chr(1|2)(:.*)?$') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GOTerm, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Retrieve miRNAs whose sequence is shorter than 20 nucleotides and that participate in GO terms positively regulating molecular functions with 'kinase' in their labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(go:GO)-[:positively_regulates]->(mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'kinase' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) < 20 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GOTerm, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, SIZE(m.Sequence)

question: For each heart-related diseases, count the number of distinct miRNAs that are over-expressed in its subclass diseases. Return also the heart disease label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(hd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE hd.Label CONTAINS 'heart' RETURN hd.Label AS HeartDisease, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount

question: Find human genes that transcribe miRNAs over-expressed in neurodegenerative diseases. Return the gene label, miRNA label, and disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene {Species:'Homo sapiens'})-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(nd:Neurodegenerative_disease) RETURN g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA, nd.Label AS Neurodegenerative_Disease

question: Find miRNAs over-expressed in cardiovascular diseases where the miRNA sequence is at least 21 nucleotides long and the diseases have recorded phenotypes features. Return the miRNA label, disease label, and phenotype label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(cv:Cardiovascular_disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 21 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, cv.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Find miRNAs under-expressed in cancers (when FDR < 0.05) that have recorded phenotypic features, at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome 1 (use 'chr1:' as matching pattern), and contain the subsequence 'CAGUU'. Return the miRNA, cancer, phenotype, and FDR of under-expression relationship.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE r.FDR < 0.05 AND ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chr1:') AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'CAGUU' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, p.Label AS Phenotype, r.FDR AS FDR

question: Which diseases whose label contains the word 'brain' have over-expressed pre-miRNAs or express miRNAs?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)<-[:over_expressed_in]-(pre:pre_miRNA) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'brain' RETURN d.Label AS BrainDisease UNION MATCH (d:Disease)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'brain' RETURN d.Label AS BrainDisease

question: Which miRNAs expressed in 'muscle'-related cancers have genomic coordinates located on chromosome 9 and participate in biological processes related to the cell cycle?
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE (c.Label CONTAINS 'muscle' OR c.Description CONTAINS 'muscle') AND ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chr9') AND (bp.Label CONTAINS 'cell cycle' OR bp.Description CONTAINS 'cell cycle') RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Which miRNAs regulate the activity of genes that cause or contribute to the infectious disease labeled as 'staphylococcal infection'? Return the miRNA, the gene, and the infectious disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(id:Infectious_disease {Label:'staphylococcal infection'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, id.Label AS InfectiousDisease

question: List diseases: 1) whose label contains the word 'chronic'; 2) that are subclasses of other disease; and 3) whose supertype disease has the phenotype labeled as “Motor delay”. Return the subtype and supertype disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (d1:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(d2:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype{Label:'Motor delay'}) WHERE d1.Label CONTAINS 'chronic' RETURN d1.Label AS Subtype, d2.Label AS Supertype, p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Identify the miRNAs transcribed from the gene 'MIR548AA2' and their homologous miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene {Label: 'MIR548AA2'})-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:in_homology_relationship_with]->(m2:miRNA) RETURN m.Label AS Transcribed_miRNA, m2.Label AS Homologous_miRNA

question: Show the neurodegenerative diseases that express miRNAs located in the cellular component labeled as 'extracellular exosome'.
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component {Label:'extracellular exosome'}) RETURN nd.Label AS NeurodegenerativeDisease, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify genes (i) from which a miRNA whose label ends with four digits followed by the string “a precursor” is transcribed and (ii) that also transcribe a pre-miRNA. Return the gene label, the miRNA label, and the pre-miRNA label
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA) WHERE m.Label=~ '.*[0-9]{4}a precursor$' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS Source_miRNA, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA

question: In which GO terms whose label contains the word 'complex' miRNAs expressed in cancers whose label contains the word 'benign' are located?
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(go:GO) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'benign' AND go.Label CONTAINS 'complex' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GOTerm

question: Which GO terms are part of biological processes whose disruption causes diseases whose label contains the word 'female infertility'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_part]->(go:GO) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'female infertility' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, go.Label AS GOterm

question: Which miRNAs are expressed by neurodegenerative diseases, that have phenotypes whose label contains the string 'Resting tremor'?
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(ph:Phenotype), (nd)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA) WHERE toLower(ph.Label) CONTAINS 'resting tremor' RETURN m.Label

question: Identify genes with 4 character labels whose activity is regulated by miRNAs developed from pre-miRNAs containing the string '31 precursor'.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) WHERE pre.Label CONTAINS '31 precursor' AND SIZE(g.Label) = 4 RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS Regulator_miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: Identify target genes regulated by miRNAs that develop from pre-miRNAs transcribed from the gene 'MIR652'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene {Label: 'MIR652'})-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(tg:Gene) RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, tg.Label AS TargetGene

question: Which cancers (excluding those containing 'familial' and 'breast') express miRNAs that regulate the activity of genes whose label does not contain numbers?
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) WHERE NOT g.Label=~ '.*[0-9].*' AND NOT c.Label CONTAINS 'familial' AND NOT c.Label CONTAINS 'breast' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: Identify miRNAs that regulate the activity of genes which genetically interact with genes whose label ends with a digit.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g1:Gene)-[:genetically_interacts_with]->(g2:Gene) WHERE g2.Label=~ '.*\d$' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g1.Label AS RegulatedGene, g2.Label AS InteractingGene

question: Identify miRNAs whose sequence ends with 'AAU' that regulate the activity of the gene 'BUB1', and also retrieve the diseases caused or contributed to by that gene.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene {Label :'BUB1'})-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'AAU' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS Disease

question: Identify miRNAs ending with '31-3p' or '31-5p' are located in the cellular component labeled as 'extracellular exosome' and their precursor pre-miRNAs (the ones they develop from).
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component {Label:'extracellular exosome'}) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH '31-3p' OR m.Label ENDS WITH '31-5p' RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify biological processes whose disruption is caused by diseases that are characterized by the phenotype labeled as 'Downturned corners of mouth' or the one labeled as 'Abnormal foot morphology'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE p.Label IN ['Downturned corners of mouth', 'Abnormal foot morphology'] RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, d.Label AS Disease, bp.Label AS DisruptedProcess

question: Which miRNAs show both over- and under-expression in the same cancer, considering only the miRNAs that end with the letter 'a'? Return the miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)<-[:under_expressed_in]-(m) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH 'a' RETURN DISTINCT m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find GO terms in which both miRNAs and precursor miRNAs participate.
cypher: MATCH (:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(g:GO)<-[:participates_in]-(:pre_miRNA) RETURN DISTINCT g.Label AS GOTerm

question: Which miRNAs have as function molecular functions whose label contains the word 'miRNA' and also participate in biological processes whose label contains the string 'protein signal transduction'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:has_function]->(mf:Molecular_function) ,(m)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'protein signal transduction' AND mf.Label CONTAINS 'miRNA' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Which mental diseases are manifestations of other mental diseases or of any disease? For each case, what is the label and the type (mental disease or other disease) of the disease they manifest from?
cypher: MATCH (md:Mental_disease)-[:manifestation_of]->(x) WHERE x:Mental_disease OR x:Disease RETURN md.Label AS MentalDisease, x.Label AS Disease, LABELS(x) AS ManifestedFrom

question: Which triplets of distinct genes are connected by genetic interactions where both interactions have a GeneMANIA weight greater than 0.002? Duplicated paths should be avoided by requiring all three genes to be different, for example enforcing a consistent ordering of the start and end genes using internal node IDs (ID(g1) < ID(g3)). Return the labels of the three genes and the GeneMANIA weights of the interactions.
cypher: MATCH (g1:Gene)-[r1:genetically_interacts_with]->(g2:Gene)-[r2:genetically_interacts_with]->(g3:Gene) WHERE (r1.GeneMANIA_weight > 0.002 AND r2.GeneMANIA_weight > 0.002) AND g1 <> g2 AND g2 <> g3 AND g1 <> g3 AND ID(g1) < ID(g3) RETURN g1.Label AS Gene1, g2.Label AS Gene2, g3.Label AS Gene3, r1.GeneMANIA_weight AS Weight12, r2.GeneMANIA_weight AS Weight23

question: Identify triplets of distinct genes that are connected by genetic interactions where both interactions have a GeneMANIA weight equal to 0.003 and at least one of the three genes has a sequence length greater than 3900 amino acids. Duplicated paths should be avoided by enforcing that all three genes are different, e.g. by applying a consistent ordering of the start and end genes using internal node IDs (ID(g1) < ID(g3)). Return the labels of the three genes and the sequence lengths of each gene.
cypher: MATCH (g1:Gene)-[r1:genetically_interacts_with]->(g2:Gene)-[r2:genetically_interacts_with]->(g3:Gene) WHERE r1.GeneMANIA_weight = 0.003 AND r2.GeneMANIA_weight = 0.003 AND (SIZE(g1.Sequence) > 3900 OR SIZE(g2.Sequence) > 3900 OR SIZE(g3.Sequence) > 3900) AND g1 <> g2 AND g2 <> g3 AND g1 <> g3 AND ID(g1) < ID(g3) RETURN g1.Label AS Gene1, g2.Label AS Gene2, g3.Label AS Gene3, SIZE(g1.Sequence) AS Gene1_Sequence_Length, SIZE(g2.Sequence) AS Gene2_Sequence_Length, SIZE(g3.Sequence) AS Gene3_Sequence_Length

question: Find all miRNAs or pre-miRNAs that are in a similarity relationship with the miRNA labeled as 'microRNA hsa-mir-410 precursor'. For each, return the label and the type of the target node.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA {Label: 'microRNA hsa-mir-410 precursor'})-[:in_similarity_relationship_with]->(m2) WHERE m2:miRNA OR m2:pre_miRNA RETURN m2.Label AS Similar_to, LABELS(m2) AS Target_Type

question: Consider all miRNAs or pre-miRNAs that are in a similarity relationship with miRNAs whose sequence length is less than 50 nucleotides. Return the label of miRNA and pre-miRNAs, its type, and the sequence length of the source miRNA.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:in_similarity_relationship_with]->(m2) WHERE (m2:miRNA OR m2:pre_miRNA) AND SIZE(m1.Sequence) < 50 RETURN m2.Label AS Similar_to, LABELS(m2) AS Target_Type, SIZE(m1.Sequence) AS Source_Sequence_Length

question: Find all genes that are transcribed into pre-miRNAs which are over-expressed in neurodegenerative diseases. Return the gene and the associated neurodegenerative disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(:pre_miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(nd:Neurodegenerative_disease) RETURN g.Label AS Gene, nd.Label AS Neurodegenerative_Disease

question: Find all genes that are transcribed into pre-miRNAs which are over-expressed in the autoimmune disease labeled as 'multiple sclerosis'. Return the gene and the pre-miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(ad:Autoimmune_disease {Label:'multiple sclerosis'}) RETURN g.Label AS Gene, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA

question: Find all genes that are transcribed into pre-miRNAs which are under-expressed in the phenotype labeled as 'Osteoporosis'. Return the gene and the corresponding pre-miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(ph:Phenotype {Label:'Osteoporosis'}) RETURN g.Label AS Gene, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA

question: Find all genes that are transcribed into pre-miRNAs which are over-expressed in phenotypes having at least one synonym containing the string 'myelom'. Return the gene, the corresponding pre-miRNA, and the phenotype label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(ph:Phenotype) WHERE ANY(s IN ph.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS 'myelom') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, ph.Label AS Phenotype_Label

question: Find all genes with sequence length shorter than 50 nucleotides that are transcribed into miRNAs, where the miRNAs are either over-expressed or under-expressed in a phenotype. Return the label of: the gene, the miRNA, and the phenotype, along with the type of expression relationship and the gene sequence length.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[r:over_expressed_in|under_expressed_in]->(ph:Phenotype) WHERE size(g.Sequence) < 50 RETURN g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA, ph.Label AS Phenotype, TYPE(r) AS Expression_Type, SIZE(g.Sequence) AS Gene_Sequence_Length

question: Find all biological processes whose label contains the word 'protein' that result in transport across a cellular component. Return the cellular component and its parent component labels.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:results_in_transport_across]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(cc1:Cellular_component) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'protein' RETURN cc.Label AS Cellular_Component, cc1.Label AS Parent_Cellular_Component

question: Find all biological processes that result in transport across a cellular component, where the cellular component is a bounding layer of a GO term. Return the label of the biological process and the cellular component.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:results_in_transport_across]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:bounding_layer_of]->(:GO) RETURN bp.Label AS Biological_Process, cc.Label AS Cellular_Component

question: Find all biological processes that result in transport across cellular components which are the bounding layer of the cellular component labeled as 'Golgi apparatus'. Return the biological process and the cellular component labels.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:results_in_transport_across]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:bounding_layer_of]->(cc1:Cellular_component {Label:'Golgi apparatus'}) RETURN bp.Label AS Biological_Process, cc.Label AS Cellular_Component

question: Find all miRNAs where a GO term is function of the miRNA and the miRNA is causal somatic mutation in the cancer labeled as 'gastric adenocarcinoma'. Return the GO term and the miRNA.
cypher: MATCH (go:GO)-[:function_of]->(m:miRNA)-[:is_causal_somatic_mutation_in]->(c:Cancer {Label:'gastric adenocarcinoma'}) RETURN go.Label AS GO_Term, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find all biological processes that start with a GO term and end with a GO term. Return the label of the biological process, the GO term it starts with, and the GO term it ends with.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:starts_with]->(go1:GO), (bp)-[:ends_with]->(go2:GO) RETURN bp.Label AS Biological_Process, go1.Label AS Starts_With_GO, go2.Label AS Ends_With_GO

question: Find all miRNAs where a biological process starts with a molecular function and the molecular function is function of the miRNA. Return the label of the biological process, the molecular function, and the miRNA.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:starts_with]->(mf:Molecular_function)-[:function_of]->(m:miRNA) RETURN bp.Label AS Biological_Process, mf.Label AS Molecular_Function, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find all miRNAs where a molecular function directly negatively regulates the molecular function labeled as 'catalytic activity' and the regulated molecular function is a function of the miRNA. Return the regulating molecular function and the miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (mf1:Molecular_function)-[:directly_negatively_regulates]->(mf2:Molecular_function {Label:'catalytic activity'})-[:function_of]->(m:miRNA) RETURN mf1.Label AS Regulating_Function, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find all phenotypes that are towards a biological process and the biological process is regulated by a GO term. Return the label of the phenotype, the biological process, and the GO term.
cypher: MATCH (ph:Phenotype)-[:towards]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:regulated_by]->(g:GO) RETURN ph.Label AS Phenotype, bp.Label AS Biological_Process, g.Label AS GO_Term

question: Find all biological processes that results in formation of anatomical entity represented by a GO term,  where that GO term has parts that are other GO terms. Return the label of the biological process and the labels of both GO terms
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:results_in_formation_of_anatomical_entity]->(go1:GO)-[:has_part]->(go2:GO) RETURN bp.Label AS Biological_Process, go1.Label AS Formation_GO, go2.Label AS Anatomical_Entity_GO

question: Find all biological processes that result in formation of anatomical entity represented in the database via a GO term which has part the cellular component labeled as 'microtubule'. Return the label of the biological process and the GO term.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:results_in_formation_of_anatomical_entity]->(go:GO)-[:has_part]->(cc:Cellular_component {Label:'microtubule'}) RETURN bp.Label AS Biological_Process, go.Label AS GO_Term

question: Find all GO terms representing processes that have as causal agents cellular components which are part of another cellular component, where either the cellular component or its parent has a description containing the string “cellular fusion”. Return the GO term and the labels and descriptions of both cellular components
cypher: MATCH (go:GO)-[:process_has_causal_agent]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(cc1:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Description CONTAINS 'cellular fusion' OR cc1.Description CONTAINS 'cellular fusion' RETURN go.Label AS GO_Process, cc.Label AS Cellular_Component, cc.Description AS Component_Description,cc1.Label AS Parent_Component_Label, cc1.Description AS Parent_Component_Description

question: Find all GO terms representing processes that have a causal agent which is a cellular component part of another cellular component, where either the cellular component or its parent component has a description containing the string 'cellular fusion'. Return the GO term, the cellular component's label and description, and the parent component's description.
cypher: MATCH (go:GO)-[:process_has_causal_agent]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(cc1:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Description CONTAINS 'cellular fusion' OR cc1.Description CONTAINS 'cellular fusion' RETURN go.Label AS GO_Process, cc.Label AS Cellular_Component, cc.Description AS Component_Description, cc1.Description AS Parent_Component_Description

question: Find all cellular components that are formed as a result of a GO term which is part of another GO term. Return the label of: cellular component, the GO term, and the parent GO term labels.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component)-[:formed_as_result_of]->(go1:GO)-[:part_of]->(go2:GO) RETURN cc.Label AS Cellular_Component, go1.Label AS GO_Term, go2.Label AS Parent_GO

question: Find all phenotypes characterized by being a part of the phenotype labeled as 'Overgrowth', and such that those phenotype parts are again part of a superior phenotype distinct from 'Overgrowth'. Return the part phenotype and the superior phenotype labels.
cypher: MATCH (ph1:Phenotype {Label:'Overgrowth'})-[:has_part]->(ph2:Phenotype)-[:part_of]->(ph3:Phenotype) WHERE ID(ph1) <> ID(ph3) RETURN ph2.Label AS Part_Phenotype, ph3.Label AS Superior_Phenotype

question: Find all GO terms that regulate molecular functions whose disruption causes an infectious disease. Return the infectious disease, the molecular function, and the GO term labels.
cypher: MATCH (id:Infectious_disease)-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(mf:Molecular_function)-[:regulated_by]->(go:GO) RETURN id.Label AS Infectious_Disease, mf.Label AS Molecular_Function, go.Label AS GO_Term

question: Find all diseases that an infectious disease predisposes towards and the diseases that are the basis of features of those diseases. Return the infectious disease, the Disease and the feature_Basis_Disease labels
cypher: MATCH (id:Infectious_disease)-[:predisposes_towards]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_has_basis_in_feature]->(d2:Disease) RETURN id.Label AS Infectious_Disease, d.Label AS Disease, d2.Label AS Feature_Basis_Disease

question: Find all pre-miRNAs with at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome 3 that are causal somatic mutations in phenotypes that are phenotype of cardiovascular diseases. Return the label of: the pre-miRNA, the phenotype, the disease, and the pre-miRNA genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:is_causal_somatic_mutation_in]->(ph:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE ANY(coord IN pre.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chr3') RETURN pre.Label AS pre_miRNA, ph.Label AS Phenotype, cd.Label AS Disease, pre.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_Coordinates

question: Find all pre-miRNAs for which all genomic coordinates are on chromosome 18 and that are causal somatic mutations in phenotypes that are phenotype of cardiovascular diseases.  Return the label of: the pre-miRNA, the phenotype, the disease, and the pre-miRNA genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:is_causal_somatic_mutation_in]->(ph:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE ALL(coord IN pre.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chr18') RETURN pre.Label AS pre_miRNA, ph.Label AS Phenotype, cd.Label AS Disease, pre.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_Coordinates

question: Find all pre-miRNAs that are characterized by at least one genomic coordinate on the positive strand ('+') and at least one on the negative strand ('-'), which are causal somatic mutations in phenotypes, that are phenotype of cardiovascular diseases. Return the label of: the pre-miRNA, the phenotype, the disease, and the pre-miRNA genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:is_causal_somatic_mutation_in]->(ph:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE ANY(coord IN pre.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord ENDS WITH '+') AND ANY(coord IN pre.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord ENDS WITH '-') RETURN pre.Label AS pre_miRNA, ph.Label AS Phenotype, cd.Label AS Disease, pre.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_Coordinates

question: Find all miRNAs with sequence length less than 20 nucleotides that directly regulate pre-miRNAs which cause or contribute to a disease. Return the miRNA and the pre-miRNA labels and the miRNA sequence length.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:directly_regulates_activity_of]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(:Disease) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) < 20 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, pre.Label AS pre_miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS miRNA_Sequence_Length

question: Which genes are causal germline mutations in diseases whose label contains 'MYH3'? Return the genes URI and the diseases label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:is_causal_germline_mutation_in]->(d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'MYH3' RETURN g.URI AS Gene_URI, d.Label AS Disease

question: Identify genes that cause or contribute to neurodegenerative diseases which predispose towards other diseases, excluding genes with any genomic coordinates on chromosome X. Return the gene, the neurodegenerative disease labels and the gene's genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(nd:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:predisposes_towards]->(:Disease) WHERE NONE(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chrX') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, nd.Label AS Neurodegenerative_Disease, g.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_Coordinates

question: Find all genes that cause or contribute to autoimmune diseases which predispose towards other diseases, restricted to genes with at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome 3 or 11. Return the gene and the autoimmune disease labels, and the gene's genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(ad:Autoimmune_disease)-[:predisposes_towards]->(:Disease) WHERE ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chr3' OR coord CONTAINS 'chr11') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, ad.Label AS Autoimmune_Disease, g.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_Coordinates

question: Find all genes that cause or contribute to infectious diseases which predispose towards other diseases, excluding genes with any genomic coordinates on chromosome 14 or 4. Return the gene and the infectious disease labels, and the gene's genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(id:Infectious_disease)-[:predisposes_towards]->(:Disease) WHERE NONE(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chr14' OR coord CONTAINS 'chr4') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, id.Label AS Infectious_Disease, g.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_Coordinates

question: Identify miRNAs that are not involved in a GO term which regulates another GO term whose label contains the word 'angiogenesis'. Return the miRNA and the regulated GO term labels.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:not_involved_in]->(go1:GO)-[:regulates]->(go2:GO) WHERE go2.Label CONTAINS 'angiogenesis' RETURN m1.Label AS miRNA, go2.Label AS Regulated_GO

question: Find the phenotypes feature of the infectious diseases that are superclasses of neurodegenerative diseases? Return the neurodegenerative disease, the infectious disease it is a subclass of, and the associated phenotype.
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:subclassof]->(id:Infectious_disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(ph:Phenotype) RETURN nd.Label AS Neurodegenerative_Disease, id.Label AS Infectious_Disease, ph.Label AS Phenotype

question: Find all pre-miRNAs that have at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome 20 on the positive strand ('+') and none on the negative strand ('-'), which are causal somatic mutations in phenotypes associated with cardiovascular diseases. Return the pre-miRNA, the phenotype, the disease, and the pre_miRNA genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:is_causal_somatic_mutation_in]->(ph:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE ANY(coord IN pre.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord CONTAINS 'chr20' AND coord ENDS WITH '+') AND NONE(coord IN pre.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord ENDS WITH '-') RETURN pre.Label AS pre_miRNA, ph.Label AS Phenotype, cd.Label AS Disease, pre.Genomic_coordinates AS Genomic_Coordinates

question: Which neurodegenerative diseases are classified as subclasses of infectious diseases that have the phenotype labeled 'Paralysis'? Return the neurodegenerative disease and the corresponding infectious disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:subclassof]->(id:Infectious_disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(ph:Phenotype {Label:'Paralysis'}) RETURN nd.Label AS Neurodegenerative_Disease, id.Label AS Infectious_Disease

question: Which miRNAs have as function GO terms that have as a part other GO terms whose label contains 'cardiac chamber'? Return the specific GO term, its parent GO term, and the miRNA.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO)-[:part_of]->(g2:GO)-[:function_of]->(m:miRNA) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'cardiac chamber' RETURN g.Label AS GO, g2.Label AS Parent_GO, m.Label AS miRNA
